summary: Iteration 62 - Artist Profile Enhancements & Backend Refactoring. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly. Tested: Artist profile with theme_color and tracks, QR code generation, track preview streaming, theme color save/get, refactored messaging routes, refactored royalty split routes, refactored payout routes, landing page 12 feature cards + 3 highlights, settings page theme color picker + QR code section.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/artist/kalmori-admin returns theme_color field
Backend: GET /api/artist/kalmori-admin returns releases with tracks array
Backend: GET /api/artist/kalmori-admin/qr returns PNG image (200 status)
Backend: GET /api/artist/kalmori-admin/track/{track_id}/preview endpoint exists
Backend: GET /api/artist/profile/theme returns current theme color
Backend: PUT /api/artist/profile/theme saves and returns theme color
Backend: GET /api/messages/conversations returns conversations list (refactored route)
Backend: GET /api/messages/unread/count returns unread count (refactored route)
Backend: GET /api/royalty-splits returns splits list (refactored route)
Backend: GET /api/royalty-splits/summary returns summary data (refactored route)
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts returns withdrawals list (refactored route)
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts/summary returns payout summary (refactored route)
Backend: GET /api/admin/payouts/schedule returns schedule config (refactored route)
Backend: POST /api/admin/payouts/batch processes batch payouts (refactored route)
Frontend: Landing page features section shows 12 feature cards
Frontend: Landing page highlights section shows Beat Marketplace
Frontend: Landing page highlights section shows Collaboration
Frontend: Landing page highlights section shows Artist Profile
Frontend: Settings page Public Profile tab loads correctly
Frontend: Settings page shows Theme Color section with 10+ preset colors
Frontend: Settings page shows custom color picker
Frontend: Settings page shows QR Code section
Frontend: Settings page shows QR code image rendered
Frontend: Settings page shows Download PNG button
Frontend: Artist Profile page at /artist/kalmori-admin loads correctly
Frontend: Artist Profile page shows artist name and avatar
Frontend: Artist Profile page shows theme color styling
Frontend: Artist Profile page shows Kalmori badge
Frontend: Artist Profile page shows Share Profile button
Frontend: Artist Profile page shows QR Code button
Frontend: Artist Profile page QR modal opens and shows QR image
Frontend: Artist Profile page QR modal has Download QR button
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account with slug 'kalmori-admin'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 tested the new Artist Profile enhancements: 1) Public artist profile endpoint now returns theme_color and tracks for each release (for audio previews), 2) QR code generation endpoint at /api/artist/{slug}/qr returns PNG image, 3) Track preview streaming at /api/artist/{slug}/track/{track_id}/preview, 4) Theme color save/get endpoints at /api/artist/profile/theme. Also verified backend refactoring: messaging routes moved to messages_routes.py, royalty split routes to royalty_routes.py, payout routes to payouts_routes.py. Landing page now has 12 feature cards (AI Release Strategy, Real-Time Analytics, Revenue Calculator, Beat Marketplace, Digital Contracts, AI Audio Watermarking, In-App Messaging, Producer Royalty Splits, Collaboration Hub, Artist Public Profile, Release Leaderboard, Goal Tracking) and 3 detailed highlight sections (Beat Marketplace, Collaboration, Artist Profile). Settings page Public Profile tab has theme color picker with 10 preset colors + custom input, and QR code section with rendered image and download button.

endpoints.GET /api/artist/{slug}: Returns theme_color and releases with tracks array

frontend.ArtistProfilePage: Shows theme color styling, QR modal, share bar with Share Profile and QR Code buttons
frontend.SettingsPage: Public Profile tab with theme color picker (10 presets + custom) and QR code section

landing_page_updates.highlights_section: 3 detailed showcases (Beat Marketplace, Collaboration, Artist Profile)
